<!-- Chart CH-TIM-01 LINE rendered in language DL-02 KATA -->

## LINE chart, KATA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-01",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "trend",
    "change-over-time"
  ],
  "form": "line",
  "data_required": "ordered periods + 2 to 4 numeric series",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-03 (area, planned)",
    "CH-TIM-05 (slope, planned)",
    "CH-TIM-06 (sparkline, planned)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "values are cumulative progress vs plan",
      "use": "CH-TIM-02"
    },
    {
      "when": "comparison across categories",
      "use": "CH-RNK-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- trend over ordered periods
- plan vs actual tracking
- 2 to 4 series maximum

Do NOT use when:
- categorical comparison (use CH-RNK-01 or CH-MAG-01)
- cumulative progress vs plan (use CH-TIM-02 S-CURVE)
- more than 4 series (use small multiples)
- unordered categories

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "string, action title stating the finding with a number",
  "eyebrow": "string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it",
  "source": "string, rendered bottom-left, always",
  "unit": "string, appears once, on the top y tick label",
  "x": "array of ordered period labels",
  "series": "array of {name: string, values: number[] same length as x, role: 'key'|'context'}, exactly one key",
  "annotation": "{text: string, series: name, index: int, tx: px, ty: px, anchor: 'start'|'end'}, points at a data point"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 96,
      "right": 756,
      "top": 128,
      "bottom": 452
    },
    "tick_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 12
    },
    "x_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 20
    },
    "series_label": {
      "size": 13,
      "offset": 10
    },
    "stroke": {
      "key": 2.5,
      "context": 2
    },
    "annotation": {
      "size": 12,
      "style": "italic"
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "y_zero": true,
    "target_ticks": 5,
    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ],
    "algorithm": "raw = max/target_ticks; mag = 10^floor(log10(raw)); step = first nice_steps*mag >= raw; top = ceil(max/step)*step"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- y starts at zero; a non-zero baseline needs a written justification in the entry that uses it
- series labeled at line ends, never a legend
- exactly one key series; the rest are context
- horizontal gridlines only
- annotation points at the data, with a leader line

### Never do this
- legend boxes
- more than one saturated series
- dual y axes
- markers on every point
- smoothed or spline-interpolated lines

### QA before delivering
- [ ] no legend anywhere
- [ ] series labels at line ends
- [ ] gridlines horizontal only
- [ ] y axis starts at zero or the justification is recorded
- [ ] annotation present and anchored to a data point
- [ ] title states a finding with a number
- [ ] source line present bottom-left

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| key | `#008080` |
| context | `#AAAAAA` |
| gridline | `#EAEAEA` |
| zero_line | `#E2E8E8` |
| tick_label | `#555555` |
| x_label | `#555555` |
| key_label | `#008080` |
| context_label | `#555555` |
| title | `#222222` |
| source | `#555555` |
| annotation | `#555555` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Rethink Sans','Segoe UI',sans-serif, weight 600
- All other text: 'Poppins','Segoe UI',sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
